subject: cas
name_zh: IB DP · CAS 创造行动服务
description: CAS involves 7 learning outcomes through Creativity, Activity, Service experiences and at least one CAS project (1 month).

nodes.name: 艺术创作
curriculum_points: Students will be able to engage in an artistic process or creative activity over an extended period, demonstrating exploration, skill development, and commitment.
Students will be able to identify and articulate the personal and collaborative challenges encountered in their creative endeavors and how they were addressed.

nodes.name: 创造性思维
curriculum_points: Students will be able to generate novel ideas and approaches within their CAS experiences, demonstrating the ability to see existing situations in new ways.
Students will be able to apply creative thinking to design, plan, and implement a CAS project, considering resources, constraints, and ethical implications.

nodes.name: 创新项目
curriculum_points: Students will be able to initiate, plan, and execute a sustained, collaborative project that addresses a community need or personal passion through an innovative approach.
Students will be able to demonstrate how their innovation project integrates at least two of the three CAS strands (Creativity, Activity, Service) and involves a series of sequential stages.

nodes.name: 体育锻炼
curriculum_points: Students will be able to participate in regular, purposeful physical exertion that contributes to a healthy lifestyle and presents personal goals and challenges.
Students will be able to reflect on how engagement in physical activity enhances their understanding of personal well-being, perseverance, and resilience.

nodes.name: 运动竞赛
curriculum_points: Students will be able to engage in organized sports or physical competitions, demonstrating an understanding of teamwork, fair play, and personal goal-setting.
Students will be able to analyze the personal and social dynamics experienced through competition, including handling success and adversity with integrity.

nodes.name: 户外探险
curriculum_points: Students will be able to undertake challenging expeditions or outdoor pursuits that require preparation, perseverance, and the development of new skills in unfamiliar environments.
Students will be able to evaluate how outdoor adventures fostered an appreciation for the natural world, personal limits, and collaborative problem-solving.

nodes.name: 社区服务
curriculum_points: Students will be able to engage in sustained, reciprocal collaboration with a community, addressing genuine needs while developing an understanding of social and civic responsibility.
Students will be able to critically examine the ethical dimensions of their service, including power dynamics, sustainability, and the impact on both self and community.

nodes.name: 志愿工作
curriculum_points: Students will be able to commit their time and energy to an organization or cause without financial reward, demonstrating reliability, empathy, and a willingness to contribute to the work of others.
Students will be able to articulate the skills and attitudes developed through voluntary service and how these relate to their personal and academic growth.

nodes.name: 倡议与倡导
curriculum_points: Students will be able to research, plan, and execute an initiative to raise awareness or promote action on a local or global issue of significance, demonstrating ethical engagement.
Students will be able to analyze the role of communication, persuasion, and collaboration in advocacy work and reflect on their personal stance and influence.

domains.name: CAS 项目与反思 / CAS Project & Reflection / CAS Project & Reflection

nodes.name: CAS Project（1 月）
curriculum_points: Students will be able to collaboratively design, implement, and evaluate a significant CAS Project of at least one month's duration that integrates one or more CAS strands and addresses a defined purpose.
Students will be able to demonstrate project management skills, including planning, division of roles, problem-solving, and sustained collaboration, throughout the CAS Project lifecycle.

nodes.name: 7 项学习成果
curriculum_points: Students will be able to provide evidence in their CAS portfolio of achieving the seven prescribed learning outcomes through a balanced range of CAS experiences.
Students will be able to demonstrate personal development across the seven learning outcomes, showing increased self-awareness, new skills, and engagement with issues of global importance.

nodes.name: 反思作品集
curriculum_points: Students will be able to maintain a curated, ongoing CAS portfolio that documents experiences, collects evidence, and provides structured reflections demonstrating growth against the CAS learning outcomes.
Students will be able to use their reflection portfolio to identify patterns in their learning, make connections between different experiences, and evaluate their overall CAS journey.

nodes.name: 终期面谈
curriculum_points: Students will be able to participate in a final, structured interview with their CAS coordinator to present and discuss their CAS journey, highlighting personal growth, achievements, and insights gained.
Students will be able to articulate how CAS has influenced their development as an IB learner and their preparedness for future endeavors beyond the Diploma Programme.
